creator: khb.dev@gmail.com
text:
+1, also affects me.

`uname -a`: FreeBSD Stygiomedusa_gigantea 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #7 main-n250631-df07bfda67a: Fri Nov 12 16:37:17 CST 2021     root@Stygiomedusa_gigantea:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

`make install clean`:
--- cairo-perf-micro.o ---
cairo-perf-micro.c:418:5: error: unknown type name 'cpu_set_t'; did you mean 'cpuset_t'?
    cpu_set_t affinity;
    ^~~~~~~~~
    cpuset_t
/usr/include/sys/_cpuset.h:50:24: note: 'cpuset_t' declared here
typedef struct _cpuset cpuset_t;
                       ^
1 error generated.
